text: 2) Physics – Short Answer Nick is sitting in a car that has a tennis ball hanging from a string attached to the ceiling. As the car accelerates forward at 2 m/s^2, he observes the ball appear to be pulled toward the back of the car. Relative to the horizontal, what is the absolute value of the tangent of the angle the string makes to the ceiling?
label: BONUS_TEXT

text: 3) Energy – Multiple Choice Researchers at Brookhaven National Lab are studying electron-hole pairing in LBCO. Which of the following is the characteristic of LBCO they are studying? W) It heats up when an external magnetic field is shut off X) Its conductance increases rapidly below 40 K Y) It develops strong spontaneous electric polarization Z) It undergoes strong resonance oscillation
label: TOSSUP_TEXT

text: ANSWER: X) ITS CONDUCTANCE INCREASES RAPIDLY BELOW 40 KELVINS
label: TOSSUP_ANSWER
